---------- Forwarded message ---------  
From: 
 
Date: Thu, 23 Jan 2025 at 18:07  
Subject: Readout: SoSNI meeting with Peter Mandelson (23/01/25)  
To: Political Affairs 
, Legacy Group 
, Special Advisers NI 
(SpAds) 
, Minister Anderson 
>, Secretary of State NI (SoS) 
, Permanent Secretary 
, MaryJo McKeever 
Good afternoon,  
Please find a readout from SoSNI's meeting with Lord Mandelson below: 
Readout: SoSNI meeting with Lord Mandelson 
23 January 2025, NIO London   
Attendees: 
Secretary of State for Northern Ireland (SoSNI), Lord Peter Mandelson (Lord Mandelson) Will Gelling, MaryJo 
McKeever, 
, 
, 
Overview:   
SoSNI had a conversation with Lord Mandelson ahead of his appointment as the UK Ambassador to the US. They 
discussed the St Patrick’s Day events in Washington, and offered an update on NI politics and the progression 
around Legacy.   
Readout: 
1. SoSNI began by congratulating Lord Mandelson and asking when he expected to be appointed, Lord Mandelson
said in 2 weeks.
2. Lord Mandelson asked about President Trump's views on NI. SoSNI said he had not spoken about NI publicly,
3. SoSNI updated Lord Mandelson on the political situation in NI, he explained this had been a very tricky time for
both Gavin Robinson and Unionism in general. He explained that there was some optimism from the Unionist
politicians around a Trump Presidency, and both Ian Paisley Jr and Baroness Hoey travelled to Washington for
the inauguration.
4.
Lord Mandelson asked about

5. SoSNI updated Lord Mandelson on progress around Legacy. He explained the commitment to repeal and
replace, but stressed he did not want to stop the ICRIR only to replace it with a similar body and delay cases
being investigated. SoSNI said he ordered an inquiry into the murder of Patrick Finucane 
, but had been ordered by a Judge to conduct a public inquiry into Brown
which the UKG was challenging.
6. SoSNI and Lord Mandelson discussed St Patrick’s Day events in Washington DC. SoSNI said he was looking
forward to the engagements but was awaiting finalised timings for the key events. Lord Mandelson asked if he
expected all the events to go ahead given the new administration, SoSNI said he believed they would.
Actions:   
No actions following the meeting. 
Best wishes, 
 
-- 
  
Private Secretary to the Secretary of State 
Northern Ireland Office  
T 
   
1 Horse Guards Road, London, SW1A 2HQ
